name: NCT03430037 active fisetin frailty registry with no posted results
summary: Source-snapshot-backed registry finding for NCT03430037: the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API snapshot retrieved 2026-06-30 lists the fisetin frailty study in older women as enrolling by invitation and contains no posted results section.

provenance.note: Finding is limited to registry status and absence of a posted results section in the retained snapshot.

statement: NCT03430037 is an enrolling-by-invitation fisetin frailty registry record in older women with no ClinicalTrials.gov posted results section in the 2026-06-30 v2 API snapshot.
population_or_model: Healthy postmenopausal women age 70 years or older
time_horizon: Registry snapshot retrieved 2026-06-30; estimated completion date 2027-11.
quantitative_note: No quantitative efficacy or safety results were posted in the retained registry snapshot.
caveats: Registry-only no-results status; not evidence of efficacy, safety, healthspan, or lifespan benefit.
Follow-up is needed after results posting or source publication.
